title: satureja montana subsp. subdentata
intro: Satureja montana subsp. subdentata, also known as mountain savory, is a subspecies of perennial herb in the mint family native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antimicrobial and antifungal agent, which can help to combat infections and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of mountain savory include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for a range of ailments. Mountain savory can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and health.
